no: Fade CN Female Fey’ri (Elven Tiefling Hybrid) Thief (Shadowdancer).
a: Mistress Elysia, Kai of Candlekeep, Lava Del'Vortel
sum: Adds Fade, a shadow thief, as a joinable BG2 NPC with a romance and personal quest involving the Shadow Thieves.
